test.doc: Click on an approved timecard >click on CONFIRM ALL button Timecard status should update to READY TO INVOICE line items should update to READY To invoice timecard status should update to Ready to Invoice In VENDOR side Timecard details timecard status should update to Ready to Invoice In VENDOR side Timecard LISTING
